qa_pairs.question: How can users monitor their active jobs within the Open OnDemand interface?
qa_pairs.answer: To monitor active jobs in Open OnDemand, users should navigate to the "Jobs" tab and select "Active Jobs." From there, they can filter jobs using a text box, sort columns by clicking on headers (like job status), and click on the ">" symbol next to a job for more details such as start/end time, node list, and the account charged.

qa_pairs.question: What additional options are available for viewing and organizing jobs in the Open OnDemand active jobs interface?
qa_pairs.answer: In the Open OnDemand active jobs interface, users can filter jobs using a text box, sort jobs by clicking on column headers (e.g., by job status), and view all jobs in the queue by selecting "All Jobs" from the drop-down menu at the top right. For a more detailed view, users can also utilize the my.scinet portal.
